mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO marine_economy_product ( location, product, value, year, diversity, ubiquity, mcp, eci, pci, density, coi, cog, rca, product_name, type, color, total_value_by_year, total_value_by_year_location, total_value_by_year_product, total_value_by_year_type, total_value_by_year_location_type, total_value_by_year_type_location ) VALUES
( #{item.location}, #{item.product}, #{item.value}, #{item.year}, #{item.diversity}, #{item.ubiquity}, #{item.mcp}, #{item.eci}, #{item.pci}, #{item.density}, #{item.coi}, #{item.cog}, #{item.rca}, #{item.productName}, #{item.type}, #{item.color}, #{item.totalValueByYear}, #{item.totalValueByYearLocation}, #{item.totalValueByYearProduct}, #{item.totalValueByYearType}, #{item.totalValueByYearLocationType}, #{item.totalValueByYearTypeLocation} )
